summary: Talks restart after Easter at Marienborg. Troels Lund Poulsen sidelined 7-10 days after acute eye surgery, increasing V negotiation rigidity. Remaining 60% of blue-party centrist pivot applied as blue PM paths are now virtually closed.
changelog: Forhandlinger genoptages efter påske ved Marienborg
Troels Lund Poulsen ude 7-10 dage efter øjenoperation → V-hårdhed stiger
Resterende blå-parti pivot mod centristisk arrangement (fuld effekt)

developments.description: Frederiksen resumes government-formation meetings Monday at Marienborg, Tuesday at Statsministeriet. RV and ALT confirmed participation. Løkke re-inserts 'S/V/KF must send positive signals' framing.
developments.impact: Process continues in forhandlinger stage; Løkke cross-bloc pressure maintained

developments.description: Troels Lund Poulsen underwent acute eye operation Saturday evening, must rest 7-10 days. Timing is mid-negotiation restart.
developments.impact: V globalHarshness up (deputy negotiators more cautious); blue-side convergence slowed

developments.description: Voxmeter poll: 50.4% favour mandates belonging to parties rather than individuals. Framed as reaction to recent expulsions creating independents.
developments.impact: Indirect legitimacy signal against relying on løsgænger-dependent majorities

parameterChanges.justification: TLP sidelined 7-10 days; deputy negotiators tend to be more cautious/rigid
Blue PM virtually dead; TLP absence makes it concrete; remaining 60% of pivot
Same logic; KF most enthusiastic pivot; remaining 60%
LA identity constraint; mainly tolerance/support from outside; remaining 60%

confidenceAssessment: medium — TLP quote is first-person; blue-party pivot is inference from accumulated signals, not single-quote evidence
